title.en: Fixed fields that are not elements — the 9.4.1 catalog of bare values inside management/action frames
title.zh: 非元素的固定字段——管理/动作帧中裸值的 9.4.1 目录

blocks.en: Most of what you read about 802.11 frame bodies is about elements — those self-describing TLV blobs that start with an Element ID and a Length. But a frame body also carries plain fixed-length values that have no wrapper at all: the receiver knows what they are purely from their position and the frame's subtype. Clause 9.4.1 is the catalog of exactly these — 'fields that are not elements.' They are the raw scalars and structured blobs that a frame stamps directly: capability bitmaps, reason and status codes, beamforming reports, SAE crypto values, dialog tokens, and more.
blocks.zh: 我们读到的关于 802.11 帧体的内容大多是“元素（element）”——那些自描述的 TLV 数据块，以 Element ID 和长度开头。但帧体里还携带着另一类纯固定长度的值，它们完全没有外层包装：接收方仅凭它们在帧中的位置以及帧的子类型就能知道它们是什么。9.4.1 节正是这类值的目录——“非元素的字段（fields that are not elements）”。它们是帧直接戳上去的裸标量和结构化数据块：能力位图、原因码与状态码、波束成形报告、SAE 密码学值、对话令牌等等。

blocks.en: Mental model: an element is a labeled box (ID + Length tell you what's inside). A 9.4.1 field is an unlabeled value at a known offset — cheaper on the air, but only legal where the frame format pins its meaning. Think of them as the named columns of a fixed record rather than a key-value bag.
blocks.zh: 心智模型：元素是一个贴了标签的盒子（ID + 长度告诉你里面是什么）；而 9.4.1 字段是位于已知偏移处的无标签值——在空口上更省字节，但只有在帧格式钉死其含义的地方才合法。可以把它们想象成固定记录中的具名列，而不是键值对集合。

blocks.en: Start with the identity and session basics every handshake leans on. Authentication Algorithm Number (9.4.1.1) says which method — Open System, FT, SAE, FILS, PASN; Authentication Transaction Sequence Number (9.4.1.2) says which step of that handshake. Beacon Interval (9.4.1.3) is the TUs between beacons; Capability Information (9.4.1.4) is the bitmap of advertised/requested options; Current AP Address (9.4.1.5) is the MAC of the AP you're on; Listen Interval (9.4.1.6) tells the AP how often a power-saving STA wakes. Reason Code (9.4.1.7) explains a deauth/disassoc/error; AID (9.4.1.8) is the association ID handed back; Status Code (9.4.1.9) is success/failure of a request; Timestamp (9.4.1.10) is the TSF clock value; Action (9.4.1.11) selects the action within a category; Dialog Token (9.4.1.12) pairs a request with its response; and Short SSID (9.4.1.71) is the 32-bit CRC shorthand for an SSID.
blocks.zh: 先看每次握手都依赖的“身份与会话”基础字段。Authentication Algorithm Number（9.4.1.1）说明用哪种方法——Open System、FT、SAE、FILS、PASN；Authentication Transaction Sequence Number（9.4.1.2）说明握手到了第几步。Beacon Interval（9.4.1.3）是信标之间的 TU 数；Capability Information（9.4.1.4）是已通告/请求选项的位图；Current AP Address（9.4.1.5）是当前所连 AP 的 MAC；Listen Interval（9.4.1.6）告诉 AP 省电站点多久醒来一次。Reason Code（9.4.1.7）解释一次去认证/解关联/错误的原因；AID（9.4.1.8）是回发的关联 ID；Status Code（9.4.1.9）是请求的成功/失败；Timestamp（9.4.1.10）是 TSF 时钟值；Action（9.4.1.11）在某个类别内选定具体动作；Dialog Token（9.4.1.12）把请求与其响应配对；Short SSID（9.4.1.71）则是 SSID 的 32 位 CRC 简写。

blocks.en: Next come the control fields that ride in BlockAck/QoS and in power/channel management. Block Ack Parameter Set (9.4.1.13) negotiates buffer size and TID; Block Ack Timeout Value (9.4.1.14) sets the BA timeout; Originator Preferred MCS (9.4.1.15) hints the rate; DELBA Parameter Set (9.4.1.16) tears a BA down; QoS Info (9.4.1.17) carries APSD/queue info. On the RF side: Measurement Pilot Interval (9.4.1.18) spaces measurement pilots; Max Transmit Power (9.4.1.19) and Transmit Power Used (9.4.1.20) bound and report TX power; Channel Width (9.4.1.21) and Operating Class And Channel (9.4.1.22) state bandwidth and where you operate; SM Power Control (9.4.1.23) toggles spatial-multiplexing power save; Target Channel (9.4.1.33) and Operating Class (9.4.1.34) name a destination channel and its regulatory class.
blocks.zh: 接下来是承载于 BlockAck/QoS 以及功率/信道管理中的控制字段。Block Ack Parameter Set（9.4.1.13）协商缓冲区大小与 TID；Block Ack Timeout Value（9.4.1.14）设定 BA 超时；Originator Preferred MCS（9.4.1.15）提示速率；DELBA Parameter Set（9.4.1.16）拆除一个 BA；QoS Info（9.4.1.17）携带 APSD/队列信息。在射频侧：Measurement Pilot Interval（9.4.1.18）控制测量导频的间隔；Max Transmit Power（9.4.1.19）与 Transmit Power Used（9.4.1.20）限定并报告发射功率；Channel Width（9.4.1.21）和 Operating Class And Channel（9.4.1.22）说明带宽与工作位置；SM Power Control（9.4.1.23）切换空间复用省电；Target Channel（9.4.1.33）与 Operating Class（9.4.1.34）指明目标信道及其管制类别。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 460 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='10' y='20' width='440' height='30' rx='3'/><line x1='130' y1='20' x2='130' y2='50'/><line x1='250' y1='20' x2='250' y2='50'/><line x1='360' y1='20' x2='360' y2='50'/><text x='70' y='39' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Capability Info</text><text x='190' y='39' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Status Code</text><text x='305' y='39' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>AID</text><text x='405' y='39' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>elements...</text><text x='10' y='70' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>fixed fields (9.4.1): no ID, no Length — known by position</text><rect x='10' y='110' width='90' height='30' rx='3' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><rect x='110' y='110' width='28' height='30' rx='3'/><rect x='148' y='110' width='28' height='30' rx='3'/><rect x='184' y='110' width='160' height='30' rx='3'/><text x='55' y='129' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Element ID</text><text x='124' y='129' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Len</text><text x='264' y='129' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>element value</text><text x='10' y='160' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>an element (for contrast): self-describing TLV</text></svg>

caption.en: A management frame body interleaves bare 9.4.1 fields (top, located by position) with self-describing elements (bottom, ID + Length + value).
caption.zh: 管理帧体把裸的 9.4.1 字段（上方，按位置定位）与自描述的元素（下方，ID + 长度 + 值）交织在一起。

blocks.en: A large slice of 9.4.1 is beamforming/MIMO feedback — the structured blobs a sounding response carries back. MIMO Control (9.4.1.24) frames an HT report; CSI Report (9.4.1.25), Noncompressed Beamforming Report (9.4.1.26) and Compressed Beamforming Report (9.4.1.27) are the three HT feedback flavors; Antenna Selection Indices (9.4.1.28) picks antennas. Then the per-PHY families repeat the pattern: VHT MIMO Control (9.4.1.46) with VHT Compressed Beamforming Report (9.4.1.47), TVHT Compressed Beamforming Report (9.4.1.48), MU Exclusive Beamforming Report (9.4.1.49) and TVHT MU Exclusive (9.4.1.50); Operating Mode (9.4.1.51), Membership Status Array (9.4.1.52) and User Position Array (9.4.1.53) for VHT MU groups; CMMG MIMO Control (9.4.1.59), CMMG Compressed Beamforming Report (9.4.1.60) and CMMG Operating Mode (9.4.1.61); and the HE set — HE MIMO Control (9.4.1.62), HE Compressed Beamforming Report (9.4.1.63), HE MU Exclusive Beamforming Report (9.4.1.64), HE CQI Report (9.4.1.65), HE Compressed Beamforming/CQI Report (9.4.1.66) and HE Sounding Feedback Segment (9.4.1.67).
blocks.zh: 9.4.1 中很大一块是波束成形/MIMO 反馈——探测响应携带回来的结构化数据块。MIMO Control（9.4.1.24）构建 HT 报告；CSI Report（9.4.1.25）、Noncompressed Beamforming Report（9.4.1.26）与 Compressed Beamforming Report（9.4.1.27）是 HT 反馈的三种形式；Antenna Selection Indices（9.4.1.28）选择天线。随后各 PHY 家族重复这一模式：VHT MIMO Control（9.4.1.46）配 VHT Compressed Beamforming Report（9.4.1.47）、TVHT Compressed Beamforming Report（9.4.1.48）、MU Exclusive Beamforming Report（9.4.1.49）与 TVHT MU Exclusive（9.4.1.50）；面向 VHT MU 分组的 Operating Mode（9.4.1.51）、Membership Status Array（9.4.1.52）与 User Position Array（9.4.1.53）；CMMG MIMO Control（9.4.1.59）、CMMG Compressed Beamforming Report（9.4.1.60）与 CMMG Operating Mode（9.4.1.61）；以及 HE 套件——HE MIMO Control（9.4.1.62）、HE Compressed Beamforming Report（9.4.1.63）、HE MU Exclusive Beamforming Report（9.4.1.64）、HE CQI Report（9.4.1.65）、HE Compressed Beamforming/CQI Report（9.4.1.66）与 HE Sounding Feedback Segment（9.4.1.67）。

blocks.en: Two more groups round out the catalog. SAE's password-authenticated handshake carries its crypto as bare fields: Send-Confirm (9.4.1.35) is the anti-replay counter, Anti-Clogging Token (9.4.1.36) defends against flooding, Scalar (9.4.1.37) and FFE/Finite Field Element (9.4.1.38) are the commit values, Confirm (9.4.1.39) proves key knowledge, and Finite Cyclic Group (9.4.1.40) names the group. Finally the DMG/S1G/EBCS scalars: Organization Identifier (9.4.1.29) is the OUI, Rate Identification (9.4.1.30), GAS Query Fragment ID (9.4.1.31), Venue Info (9.4.1.32), TXOP Reservation (9.4.1.41), Relay Capable STA Info (9.4.1.42), Band ID (9.4.1.43), DMG Parameters (9.4.1.44), CMMG Parameters (9.4.1.45), Device Location Information Body (9.4.1.54), WSM Type/WSM Information (9.4.1.55), Sync Control (9.4.1.56), Suspend Duration (9.4.1.57), TWT Information (9.4.1.58) for target wake time, and the EBCS trio — EBCS Content Request (9.4.1.68), EBCS Content Response (9.4.1.69) and EBCS Info Frame Tx Countdown (9.4.1.70).
blocks.zh: 还有两组补全这份目录。SAE 的口令认证握手把密码学内容作为裸字段携带：Send-Confirm（9.4.1.35）是防重放计数器，Anti-Clogging Token（9.4.1.36）抵御洪泛攻击，Scalar（9.4.1.37）与 FFE / 有限域元素（9.4.1.38）是 commit 值，Confirm（9.4.1.39）证明已掌握密钥，Finite Cyclic Group（9.4.1.40）指明所用群。最后是 DMG/S1G/EBCS 标量：Organization Identifier（9.4.1.29）即 OUI，Rate Identification（9.4.1.30）、GAS Query Fragment ID（9.4.1.31）、Venue Info（9.4.1.32）、TXOP Reservation（9.4.1.41）、Relay Capable STA Info（9.4.1.42）、Band ID（9.4.1.43）、DMG Parameters（9.4.1.44）、CMMG Parameters（9.4.1.45）、Device Location Information Body（9.4.1.54）、WSM Type/WSM Information（9.4.1.55）、Sync Control（9.4.1.56）、Suspend Duration（9.4.1.57）、用于目标唤醒时间的 TWT Information（9.4.1.58），以及 EBCS 三件套——EBCS Content Request（9.4.1.68）、EBCS Content Response（9.4.1.69）与 EBCS Info Frame Tx Countdown（9.4.1.70）。

summary.en: Why position-coded, and a worked example: the Authentication Algorithm Number values
summary.zh: 为何采用位置编码，及一个实例：认证算法号的取值

blocks.en: Clause 9.4.1 opens by defining these as the components of a management/extension frame body that are not elements — they appear at fixed offsets and are interpreted by the frame subtype, not by an embedded Element ID/Length. A concrete read: the Authentication Algorithm Number field (9.4.1.1) is a two-octet value whose meaning is fully enumerated — 0 = Open System, 2 = Fast BSS Transition, 3 = SAE, 4 = FILS Shared Key without PFS, 5 = FILS Shared Key with PFS, 6 = FILS Public Key, 7 = PASN, 65535 = vendor specific (which implies a Vendor Specific element is also present), all others reserved. Notice the elegance: this is a two-byte scalar with no ID and no length, yet it is unambiguous because an Authentication frame body always places it first. The same logic governs the whole 9.4.1 catalog — fixed fields are the frame's named columns, while elements are its extensible key-value bag.
blocks.zh: 9.4.1 节开篇即把这些定义为管理/扩展帧体中“非元素”的组成部分——它们出现在固定偏移处，其含义由帧子类型决定，而非由内嵌的 Element ID/长度决定。举一个具体例子：Authentication Algorithm Number 字段（9.4.1.1）是一个两字节的值，其取值被完整枚举——0 = Open System，2 = Fast BSS Transition，3 = SAE，4 = 不带 PFS 的 FILS 共享密钥，5 = 带 PFS 的 FILS 共享密钥，6 = FILS 公钥，7 = PASN，65535 = 厂商自定义（意味着同时携带一个 Vendor Specific 元素），其余值保留。其精巧之处在于：这是一个没有 ID、没有长度的两字节标量，却毫不含糊，因为认证帧体总是把它放在最前面。整个 9.4.1 目录都遵循同样的逻辑——固定字段是帧的具名列，而元素是它可扩展的键值集合。

cites.note: 9.4.1 Fields that are not elements — intro; 9.4.1.1 Authentication Algorithm Number enumerated values; 9.4.1.2 Authentication Transaction Sequence Number
9.4.1.3-9.4.1.7 — Beacon Interval, Capability Information bitmap, Current AP Address, Listen Interval, Reason Code
